title: Dense Adventurous Roasted Thai Trout Khanom-Thai
description: A light and adventurous Thai dish featuring trout, yuzu-cure, and a unique twist on traditional Khanom-Thai.
instructions: Season the trout fillets with salt and pepper.
In a small bowl, whisk together yuzu juice, melted coconut oil, sliced Thai red chilies, minced garlic, and chopped fresh cilantro.
Place the trout fillets in a baking dish and brush the yuzu-cure mixture evenly over both fillets.
Roast the trout in the preheated oven for 12 minutes or until cooked through.
Remove the trout from the oven and let it rest for 2 minutes before serving.
Serve the trout with a drizzle of fish sauce and a sprinkle of chopped fresh cilantro.
Garnish with additional Thai red chilies and fresh cilantro if desired.
